name: Danish Fondue
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces Lean middle bacon, rind removed and finely chopped
Chunks of light rye bread (to serve)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bacon, onion, and butter in a saucepan.
2. Cook over medium heat until the bacon is golden brown and the onion is soft.
3. Stir in flour, then gradually add lager while stirring constantly.
4. Add cheeses one at a time, stirring frequently to prevent curdling.
5. Continue cooking until all cheeses have melted and the mixture is smooth.
6. Pour into a fondue pot and serve with gherkins and rye bread slices on the side.
(Serves 4-6)
